sections.paragraph:
Original: מעקה

Transliteration: ma‛ăqeh

Phonetic: mah-ak-eh'

BDB Definition:

  1. parapet
    1. a low wall at the edge of a balcony, roof, etc., or along the sides of a bridge etc.

Origin: from an unused root meaning to repress

TWOT entry: 1679a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
